industry: software architecture — application & system architecture for web / mobile / distributed back-ends; designing services + data models + data flow + integration boundaries; making explicit trade-offs about scalability / coupling / consistency / evolvability; not hardware / chip architecture, not pure enterprise-architecture (TOGAF/Zachman), not pure DevOps / SRE, not pure security architecture (those are adjacent disciplines).
industry_cn: 软件架构 (含 应用架构 / 系统架构 / 分布式 后端架构 / 前后端 数据流 与 数据模型 设计 / API 边界 / 可扩展性 / 演进式架构 — 不含 硬件架构 / 纯企业架构 / 纯 DevOps / 纯安全架构)
industry_en: software architecture — practitioner role of architect / staff+ engineer / tech lead whose unit of production is a *system design*: bounded services, data models, data-flow contracts, integration patterns, deployment topology, fitness functions and architecture decision records; spanning monolith ↔ modular monolith ↔ microservices ↔ event-driven ↔ serverless trade-offs, polyglot persistence, API styles (REST / GraphQL / gRPC / async), front-end architecture (SPA / SSR / micro-frontend / BFF), evolutionary architecture and refactoring of legacy systems
_auto_mode_note: 本 intake 由 launchd 04:00 / 16:00 蒸馏 cron 自动生成 (2026-05-17, DistillRequest 用户提交 name_cn='软件架构师', name_en='' 用户没填, description='前后端数据流、数据模型的最优、最可扩展的架构设计，根据需求，综合设计原则给出最优的建议'). 无 1-1 用户对话; slug 选 software-architecture 与建筑设计 (architecture-design) 区分; industry_en 用 'software architecture' 而非 'software architect' 因 大师 skill 蒸馏的是 discipline 不是单一头衔; locale=global 双语并重 (canon 90% 英文奠基 Parnas/Brooks/Fowler/Hohpe/Evans/Kleppmann, 但中文当代 阿里/腾讯/字节 实践 + 极客时间 / InfoQ 中文 / 公众号 一手厚度足够互补); primary=operational + secondary=academic 因 软件架构 = 强 SOP (系统设计流程 + ADR + fitness function + evolutionary refactor) + 强 canon (50 年传承 Parnas 1972 → DDIA 2017 → Building Evolutionary Architectures 2017→Software Architecture: The Hard Parts 2021). 用户 description 强调 '前后端数据流 + 数据模型 + 最优 / 最可扩展 + 综合设计原则' — 整体 align application/system architecture vertical, 不偏 EA / 不偏 hardware. profile=practitioner 因用户是 '架构师' 头衔.
core_subdomains_candidates: Style & topology trade-offs: monolith → modular monolith → service-oriented → microservices → serverless / functions → event-driven / pub-sub → CQRS+ES → mesh / cell-based; 每种 fitness + 何时切换 + 反模式

Data architecture: relational 建模 (3NF / 反范式) / document / graph / time-series / event log / search; polyglot persistence 选型决策树; OLTP vs OLAP vs HTAP; CDC + Outbox + Debezium 数据同步; sharding / partition 策略

API & integration: REST + Richardson maturity + HATEOAS / GraphQL (schema design / federation / Apollo) / gRPC + protobuf / WebSocket / WebHooks / async via Kafka-RabbitMQ-NATS-Pulsar; Enterprise Integration Patterns (Hohpe) 65 个 pattern

Front-end architecture: SPA / SSR / SSG / ISR / island / RSC; micro-frontend (module federation / iframe / web components); BFF; 状态管理 (Flux / Redux / Recoil / Jotai / signals); data fetching layer (Apollo / urql / React Query / SWR) — 关键: front-end 数据模型 与 back-end 边界

Distributed systems 基础: CAP / PACELC / consensus (Paxos / Raft / EPaxos) / 时序 (Lamport / vector clock / HLC) / 一致性谱系 (linearizable → serializable → causal → eventual) / failure modes / chaos engineering

Scalability & performance: load balancing (L4/L7) / caching (CDN / Redis / in-process) / partition / replication; throughput vs latency 取舍; back-pressure / queue 深度; capacity planning; 性能 budget; flamegraph / continuous profiling
Reliability: SLO / SLI / error budget / circuit breaker / bulkhead / retry+jitter / hedged request / quorum read; chaos (Netflix Simian / Chaos Mesh); incident review (postmortem culture)

Security architecture (轻量, 不深入 vertical): authn (OIDC / OAuth2 / WebAuthn / mTLS) + authz (RBAC / ABAC / ReBAC / OPA / Cedar) / secret 管理 (Vault / KMS) / zero-trust / 网络 segmentation — 仅边界 + 选型, 不深入威胁建模
Observability: structured logs / metrics (RED + USE) / traces (OpenTelemetry / W3C trace context) / continuous profiling / event streams; Grafana / Honeycomb / Datadog / New Relic 选型决策

Architecture documentation & decision: C4 model (Simon Brown) / 4+1 view (Kruchten) / arc42 / ADR (Architecture Decision Record) / structurizr DSL / Mermaid / PlantUML; ADR 模板 + git-versioned ADR + 'lightweight architecture decision records' (Nygard)

Domain-Driven Design (DDD): strategic (bounded context / context map / ubiquitous language / sub-domains: core / supporting / generic) + tactical (aggregate / entity / value object / domain event / domain service / repository); DDD + microservice service boundary 同构 (Newman)

Evolutionary architecture & legacy: fitness functions / architecture testing (ArchUnit / NetArchTest / Konsist) / strangler fig pattern / branch-by-abstraction / dark launch / feature flags (LaunchDarkly / Unleash / GrowthBook) / 反向 conway-maneuver

Architectural styles 教科书 6 style: data-centric / data-flow (pipe-and-filter / batch) / call-and-return (主从 / OO / 分层) / independent-component (event-driven / 并发) / virtual machine (interpreter / rule-based) / repository-centric (DB-centric / blackboard)

AI & 架构 (2024-2026): LLM 在架构师工作中的位置 (boilerplate / ADR draft / pattern 学习 / test generation); LLM-native 应用架构 (RAG / agent loop / context window / tool use / memory / eval pipeline); 架构师角色被重塑 (less typing more judgment / cross-system thinking 更值钱); 反面: 不要让 LLM 决定关键 trade-off
团队拓扑 (Skelton+Pais Team Topologies): stream-aligned / platform / enabling / complicated-subsystem 四类 + 三种 interaction mode; 与 microservice 边界同构 — 反 Conway's Law 主动设计
成本架构 / FinOps 视角: cloud bill 是架构产物 (compute / network egress / storage / db / observability), 早期忽视 → 后期天花板; sustainability (carbon-aware computing)

中国本土特殊议题: 阿里 / 腾讯 / 字节 / 美团 等大厂中间件栈 (Dubbo / Sentinel / Nacos / RocketMQ / SkyWalking) vs 国际 (gRPC / Envoy / Kafka / OpenTelemetry); 信通院 / CNCF 中国生态; 高并发 / 春晚级流量 / 双 11 案例集中; 数据安全法 / 个保法 对架构边界影响; 国产化 OS / DB 替代浪潮; 996 / 大厂职级 (P5-P9) 对架构师定义不同; 实际中小公司架构 = 单体 + MySQL + Redis, 不要照搬大厂
key_figures_candidates: Martin Fowler (ThoughtWorks Chief Scientist — Refactoring / Patterns of Enterprise Application Architecture / NoSQL Distilled / Microservices.io 系列 blog; martinfowler.com 是软件架构 #1 evergreen 资源; 流派: enterprise pattern / refactoring / microservices 提出者之一)
Sam Newman (Building Microservices 1st & 2nd ed / Monolith to Microservices / From Monolith to Microservices; 流派: microservices 实操权威, 但同时是 'do not start with microservices' 的代表声音)
Eric Evans (Domain Language Inc — Domain-Driven Design Tackling Complexity 2003; 流派: DDD 奠基; 2003 至今 DDD community 主声 + DDD Europe 主题人物)
Vaughn Vernon (Implementing Domain-Driven Design / Reactive Messaging Patterns / Domain-Driven Design Distilled; 流派: DDD 实操化 + reactive / actor model 整合)
Robert C. Martin / Uncle Bob (cleancoder.com / Clean Architecture / Clean Code / Clean Agile; 流派: Clean Architecture / SOLID / hexagonal 风格普及者; 注: 部分观点社区争议)
Gregor Hohpe (enterpriseintegrationpatterns.com / Enterprise Integration Patterns 2003 / The Software Architect Elevator / Cloud Strategy; 流派: integration pattern 奠基 + 架构师角色定义)

Neal Ford (ThoughtWorks Director — Building Evolutionary Architectures / Fundamentals of Software Architecture / Software Architecture The Hard Parts / Functional Thinking; 流派: evolutionary architecture / fitness function 奠基)
Rebecca Parsons (ThoughtWorks CTO emeritus — Building Evolutionary Architectures co-author / Tech Radar 长期 stewardship; 流派: evolutionary architecture)

Mark Richards (developertoarchitect.com — Fundamentals of Software Architecture / Software Architecture The Hard Parts / Software Architecture Patterns 早期 O'Reilly mini-book; 流派: architecture style 教科书化, '架构师 SOFT skills' 课程权威)
Simon Brown (structurizr.com — Software Architecture for Developers; 流派: C4 model 提出者 + ADR 推广)
Philippe Kruchten (UBC 教授 — 4+1 architectural view model 1995 IEEE Software 经典; 流派: architecture documentation 学术奠基, RUP architect role)
Michael Nygard (Release It! / Wide Awake Developers blog; 流派: production-grade / stability pattern (circuit breaker / bulkhead / timeout) 奠基)
Martin Kleppmann (Cambridge researcher — Designing Data-Intensive Applications 2017 / Local-First Software 2019 paper / Automerge; 流派: distributed data 实操权威, 2017-2026 软件架构师必读 #1)
Pat Helland (Salesforce architect, 前 Microsoft / Amazon — Life Beyond Distributed Transactions / Immutability Changes Everything / Idempotence is not a Medical Condition; 流派: 大规模数据系统 / 一致性思想)
Werner Vogels (AWS CTO — All Things Distributed blog; 流派: cloud-scale / eventual consistency / DynamoDB 设计哲学)
Jay Kreps (Confluent CEO, 前 LinkedIn — The Log What every software engineer should know 2013 LinkedIn engineering post / I Heart Logs book / Kafka 创始人之一; 流派: log-centric / event-driven 思想)
Leslie Lamport (Microsoft Research, Turing Award 2013 — Time Clocks and the Ordering of Events / Paxos / TLA+; 流派: distributed systems 学术奠基, formal methods)
Greg Young (greenfields developer — CQRS / Event Sourcing 提出者; 流派: CQRS+ES 奠基 + DDD 实操化)
Udi Dahan (NServiceBus 创始人 — particular.net; 流派: SOA / EDA 在 .NET 生态的奠基者)
Chris Richardson (microservices.io — Microservices Patterns 书 / Eventuate framework / 'microservices 11+' workshop; 流派: microservices pattern catalog 系统化)
Adrian Cockcroft (前 Netflix Cloud Architect / 前 AWS VP Sustainability — Microservices @ Netflix 范本 / Sustainability 议题; 流派: cloud-native + sustainability)
Cindy Sridharan (Distributed Systems Observability 2018 O'Reilly mini-book / @copyconstruct; 流派: observability 思想代表)
Charity Majors (Honeycomb co-founder, CTO — observability / 'production engineering' culture; 流派: observability + ops/dev 文化)
Liz Fong-Jones (Honeycomb principal — SRE / SLO 实操; 流派: SRE / observability)
Mikael Skelton + Manuel Pais (Team Topologies 2019 / TeamTopologies.com; 流派: 团队拓扑 ↔ 架构边界 同构方法论)
Brendan Burns (前 Google 现 Microsoft — Kubernetes co-founder / Designing Distributed Systems / Cloud Native Patterns; 流派: cloud-native 设计模式)
Kelsey Hightower (前 Google Cloud — Kubernetes-the-hard-way 教程作者 / cloud-native 思想布道者; 流派: cloud-native + simplicity 主义)
Lin Clark (前 Mozilla 现 Fastly — WebAssembly + 编译器 + 浏览器 deep-dive; 流派: front-end / WASM 架构布道者)
Dan Abramov (Redux co-author / React Server Components 提出者之一, 前 Meta — overreacted.io; 流派: front-end 状态 / 数据流 设计)
陈皓 (左耳朵耗子 — CoolShell.cn 博客 (1.9M+ 阅读) + MegaEase 开源 / 创始人, 2024-12 去世; 流派: 中文软件架构布道 #1, 多年深度长文 — 注: 必须诚实标 '已故 2024-12' 但内容长效)
李运华 (《亿级流量网站架构核心技术》2017 / 极客时间《从 0 开始学架构》专栏 30 万+ 订阅 / 阿里高级技术专家; 流派: 中文大厂架构 — 高并发 / 高可用 实操化)
沈剑 (公众号 '架构师之路' / 58 同城前架构部副总; 流派: 中文中型互联网架构经验; 文章简短可执行, 但偏 trick 不偏 first principle)
蔡超 (Amazon principal engineer / 极客时间专栏 / 中文软件架构话语权; 流派: 全球大厂经验 + 中文传播; 偏体系化)
张逸 (中文 DDD 推广 — 《领域驱动设计实践》/《解构领域驱动设计》ThoughtWorks 中国 前首席咨询师; 流派: DDD 中文权威)
丁雪丰 (杭州 ThoughtWorks 前首席咨询师 / 《敏捷开发实践》多本译者; 流派: 软件工程 + 微服务 中文传播)
Daniel Terhorst-North (originalfunctional.com — BDD 提出者 + 'It's the Architecture, Stupid' 一类长 talk; 流派: 软件设计哲学批评家)
Kent Beck (Extreme Programming / TDD / Tidy First? / Smalltalk best practice / Empirical Software Engineering 教授; 流派: XP / TDD 奠基 + 软件设计 思维)
Michael Feathers (Working Effectively with Legacy Code 2004; 流派: legacy code refactoring 奠基)
ANTI-figure 1: 'Architecture Astronaut' (Joel Spolsky 2001 创词, 指 over-abstract 脱离 deliverable 的架构师 — 必须保留作 反例 / 反模式)
ANTI-figure 2: 'Resume-driven development' / 'Cargo cult microservices' / 'Kubernetes for a CRUD app' — community 创词反模式, 必须保留

学派 / 流派 (理论维度): 1) Pattern movement (GoF / Fowler / Hohpe — pattern catalog 思维) 2) Domain-Driven Design (Evans / Vernon / 张逸 — bounded context + ubiquitous language) 3) Clean / Hexagonal / Onion (Uncle Bob / Cockburn — 端口适配器 / 关注点分离) 4) Microservices (Newman / Richardson / Cockcroft — 服务边界 / 独立部署) 5) Event-driven & log-centric (Young / Kreps / Helland — log as source of truth + CQRS+ES) 6) Distributed systems thinking (Lamport / Kleppmann / Vogels — 一致性 + 失败 + 时序) 7) Evolutionary architecture (Ford / Parsons / Brown — fitness function + ADR + 持续演进) 8) Cloud-native (Burns / Hightower / Cockcroft — K8s / serverless / 12-factor) 9) Front-end architecture (Abramov / Clark / micro-frontend 流派 — 数据流 / 状态 / 组件边界) 10) 中国大厂中间件实践 (阿里 Dubbo / 字节 / 美团 / 腾讯 — 高并发 + 春晚级流量 + 国产化)

学派 / 流派 (商业模式维度): 1) Independent thought leader (Fowler / Newman / Kleppmann / Evans — 作者 + 咨询 + workshop) 2) Consulting firm staff architect (ThoughtWorks / 中型咨询) 3) Big-tech principal engineer (Amazon / Google / Meta / Microsoft / 阿里 P9+) 4) Startup founder-CTO (Honeycomb Charity / Confluent Kreps / Vercel — 把架构思想做成 product) 5) 教学 + 课程作者 (Mark Richards developertoarchitect / Alex Xu ByteByteGo / 李运华 极客时间) 6) 学术 (Lamport / Kruchten / 大学教授)
key_tools_candidates: Drawing / diagramming: draw.io (diagrams.net) / Lucidchart / Excalidraw / Miro / FigJam / Whimsical — 系统设计 草图主流
Architecture-as-code: Structurizr (Simon Brown — C4 DSL) / PlantUML / Mermaid (Markdown 内嵌, GitHub 原生支持) / D2 (Terrastruct) / Likeable diagrams
C4 model + 4+1 view: Structurizr Lite / Cloud / on-premises; 模型 4 层 (Context / Container / Component / Code)
ADR (Architecture Decision Records): adr-tools (Nygard original) / log4brains / adr-viewer / GitHub 仓库 内 docs/adr/ Markdown 文件 — 业界事实标准
API design: OpenAPI 3.x + Swagger Editor / Stoplight Studio (现 SmartBear) / Postman / Bruno (开源 alternative) / Insomnia / Hoppscotch (开源 web)
GraphQL: Apollo Studio / Apollo Federation / Hasura / Postgraphile / Relay / urql / GraphQL Mesh
gRPC + protobuf: protoc + buf.build (LinkedIn fork buf — schema linting / breaking-change detection) / grpcurl / grpc-web
Async messaging: Apache Kafka + Confluent Schema Registry / Apache Pulsar / RabbitMQ / NATS / Redpanda / AWS SQS+SNS / GCP Pub/Sub / Azure Service Bus / 阿里 RocketMQ
Service mesh: Istio / Linkerd / Consul / Cilium (eBPF-based) / 阿里 ASM / Tetrate
Orchestration: Kubernetes (k8s) / Nomad (HashiCorp) / ECS+Fargate / Cloud Run / Azure Container Apps / Fly.io machines
Database (OLTP): PostgreSQL / MySQL / MariaDB / SQLite / CockroachDB / TiDB (国产 NewSQL) / YugabyteDB / Spanner / Aurora / Vitess
Database (document / graph / KV / search): MongoDB / DynamoDB / Cassandra / ScyllaDB / Redis / Couchbase / Neo4j / DGraph / TigerGraph / Elasticsearch / OpenSearch / Meilisearch / Typesense
Analytics / OLAP / HTAP: ClickHouse / DuckDB / StarRocks (国产) / Apache Doris (国产) / Snowflake / BigQuery / Redshift / Databricks / Apache Druid / Apache Pinot
Streaming + CDC: Apache Flink / Apache Spark Streaming / Kafka Streams / ksqlDB / Debezium (CDC) / Materialize / RisingWave / Apache Beam
Data orchestration: dbt / Apache Airflow / Dagster / Prefect / Mage / Temporal (workflow orchestration)
API gateway: Kong / Tyk / Envoy + Gloo / Apache APISIX (国产) / AWS API Gateway / 阿里 EdgeRoutine
Caching / CDN: Redis / Memcached / Varnish / Cloudflare / Fastly / Akamai / 阿里云 CDN
Auth: Auth0 / Okta / Keycloak / Authentik / Logto / Ory (Hydra + Kratos + Keto + Oathkeeper) / WorkOS / Stytch — OIDC/OAuth2; 内部 OPA (Open Policy Agent) / Cedar (AWS open source) / SpiceDB (ReBAC)

Observability: OpenTelemetry (vendor-neutral standard) + Jaeger / Zipkin (traces); Prometheus + Grafana (metrics); Loki / Elasticsearch (logs); Honeycomb / Datadog / New Relic / Splunk / Dynatrace / Lightstep (商业 unified); 阿里 SkyWalking (国产 APM); Sentry (error tracking)
Continuous profiling: Grafana Pyroscope / Polar Signals / Parca / Datadog Profiler / pprof (Go) / async-profiler (JVM)
Chaos engineering: Chaos Monkey (Netflix) / Chaos Mesh / Litmus / Gremlin / AWS Fault Injection Simulator
Load testing: k6 (Grafana, JS scriptable) / Locust (Python) / Artillery / Apache JMeter / Gatling / Vegeta — 容量 / 极限 / soak test 主流
Feature flags / experimentation: LaunchDarkly / Statsig / GrowthBook / Unleash / Optimizely / 字节 Feature Hub
Schema registry / API governance: Confluent Schema Registry / buf.build / Apicurio / SmartBear Apigee / 阿里 Apsara MQ Schema
Architecture testing: ArchUnit (Java) / NetArchTest (.NET) / Konsist (Kotlin) / pyArchTest (Python) — fitness function 落地
Documentation: Backstage (Spotify, dev portal + tech radar 自托管) / Docusaurus / MkDocs Material / GitBook / Notion / Confluence
Cloud / IaC: Terraform / OpenTofu (fork) / Pulumi / AWS CDK / Crossplane / Helm / Kustomize
Migration / refactoring 工具: OpenRewrite (declarative refactoring) / IntelliJ structural search / SonarQube architecture rules / NDepend (.NET) / Sourcegraph code intelligence

中国本土补充: Apache Dubbo (RPC) / Apache RocketMQ / Apache SkyWalking (APM) / Apache APISIX (gateway) / Apache ShardingSphere (sharding) / Nacos (注册中心 + 配置) / Sentinel (限流熔断) / Seata (分布式事务) / TDengine (国产 时序数据库) / 蚂蚁 SOFAStack / 腾讯 TARS / 字节 ByteHouse
AI 辅助架构 (2024-2026): GitHub Copilot Chat / Cursor / Claude Code / Aider / Codeium — boilerplate + ADR draft + 模式建议; 反面: 不靠 LLM 决定 trade-off
Linting / 静态分析: ESLint / golangci-lint / SonarQube / CodeClimate / Snyk / Semgrep (架构规则可写 semgrep rule)
information_sources_candidates: Martin Fowler's website (martinfowler.com — 1996 至今 evergreen blog, software architecture #1 reference)
microservices.io (Chris Richardson — microservices pattern catalog)
enterpriseintegrationpatterns.com (Gregor Hohpe + Bobby Woolf — 65 integration patterns)
ThoughtWorks Technology Radar (双年发布 半年 cycle; April + October — quadrant: Adopt / Trial / Assess / Hold; 行业风向标但有 ThoughtWorks 偏好 bias)
InfoQ (infoq.com — 全球软件工程行业 #1, 含 architecture / DevOps / language; 中文 站 infoq.cn 独立运营)
DZone Architecture zone (dzone.com — 行业 trade press, 部分内容质量参差)
High Scalability blog (highscalability.com — Todd Hoff 2007 至今, '系统设计案例集' #1; 频率偏低但 case study 经典)
ByteByteGo Newsletter + book (Alex Xu — 系统设计每周一图, 30 万+ 订阅; System Design Interview 系列书, 同名 YouTube)
The Pragmatic Engineer Newsletter + book (Gergely Orosz — 'Hiring Engineering Managers' 起家, 现 70 万+ 订阅 paid newsletter, 偏 staff+ engineer / 架构师 视角)
All Things Distributed (allthingsdistributed.com — Werner Vogels AWS CTO blog 2004 至今 — 一手 cloud-scale 架构思想)
Pat Helland's writings (ACM Queue + cidrdb.org papers — Life Beyond Distributed Transactions / Immutability Changes Everything 等经典 paper)
ACM Queue (queue.acm.org — peer-reviewed 工业级架构杂志, 1980s 起)
IEEE Software (computer.org/csdl/magazine/so — 双月刊学术 + 工业 桥梁)
USENIX OSDI / SOSP / NSDI / ATC (顶级 systems conference; 论文公开 PDF 含 Google / Meta / Microsoft 大规模架构原始 design doc — primary 一手)
SIGMOD / VLDB / ICDE (data management 顶会, 数据库架构原始论文)
EuroSys / SOSP papers via The Morning Paper (Adrian Colyer 2014-2021 archive blog.acolyer.org — 每日一篇 paper review, 现暂停但 archive 长效)
arXiv cs.DC + cs.SE + cs.DB (distributed / software engineering / databases — preprint 主流)
Software Engineering Daily Podcast (softwareengineeringdaily.com — Jeff Meyerson 2015 起, Jeff 去世后 SE Daily 团队接手, 周三 episode 集中 architecture)
Software Engineering Radio (se-radio.net — IEEE 旗下, 月 4-6 episodes, 中长 deep-dive)
Thoughtworks Technology Podcast (双周, ThoughtWorks 资深 architect 圆桌)
InfoQ Architects Newsletter (infoq.com/architecture — 周邮件)
QCon 大会 (英语: SF / NY / London / Munich / Plus virtual; 中文: 上海 / 北京 / 广州 / 深圳 ArchSummit; 由 InfoQ 主办 — 行业 #1 实践分享会)
AWS re:Invent (12 月, AWS architecture + chalk-talk + workshop)
Google Cloud Next (4 月)
Microsoft Build / Ignite (5 月 + 11 月)
KubeCon + CloudNativeCon (CNCF 主办, EU + NA + China + India + Japan 多场)
GOTO Conferences (gotopia.tech — Goto Berlin / Aarhus / Amsterdam / Copenhagen / Chicago, video 永久免费上 YouTube)
DDD Europe (一年一度 — DDD 流派核心年会)
Domain-Driven Design Crew (ddd-crew.github.io — Eric Evans 等开源 community)
ACM SIGSOFT / ACM TOSEM (academic)
O'Reilly Software Architecture Conference (已停办 2020, archive 仍有价值)
ThoughtWorks Insights (thoughtworks.com/en-us/insights — 长文 + 案例)
Microsoft Architecture Center (learn.microsoft.com/azure/architecture — Azure 架构 reference + 模式)
AWS Architecture Center / AWS Well-Architected Framework (aws.amazon.com/architecture — 6 pillar + 多 lens — reference 一手)
Google Cloud Architecture Framework (cloud.google.com/architecture/framework — 5 pillar)
Reactive Manifesto (reactivemanifesto.org — 2014 短文, 4 性质: responsive / resilient / elastic / message-driven)
12-Factor App (12factor.net — Heroku 创始人 Adam Wiggins 2011 — cloud-native 经典短文)
中文一手 podcast: 捕蛇者说 (Python / 软件工程 / 偶尔架构) / Talk Python To Me (英文但中国架构师听众多) / 编程胡说 (中文软件架构) — 注: 中文播客数量少于英文 5-10 倍
InfoQ 中文 (infoq.cn — 阿里腾讯字节 架构师文章 + 译文)
极客时间 (geektime.cn) — 付费专栏 + Geek Newsletter; 软件架构课程含 李运华《从 0 开始学架构》/ 蔡超《架构师的成长之路》/ 王宝令《Java 并发编程实战》/ ThoughtWorks 多门; 注: 知识付费产品, 质量参差但行业渗透度高
公众号 '架构师之路' (沈剑) — 中文中型互联网架构经验主阵地, 文章简短 (注: 公众号在 zh-CN 黑名单, 需 surrogate_primary 处理)
公众号 '阿里中间件' / '美团技术团队' / '字节跳动技术团队' / '腾讯技术工程' — 中文大厂技术博客主阵地 (同上 surrogate_primary)
CoolShell.cn 博客 (陈皓 / 左耳朵耗子 — 2009-2024, 1.9M+ 阅读; 站长 2024-12 去世但 archive 长效, 中文软件架构布道 #1)
MegaEase blog (megaease.com — 陈皓创立 — Easegress / open source service mesh)
ArchSummit (上海 / 深圳 / 北京 — InfoQ 中文主办, 一年 4-6 场, 中文实践 #1)
GIAC 大会 (高可用架构技术大会 — msup 主办, 上海 + 深圳)
GMTC 全球大前端技术大会 (InfoQ 主办)
QCon 北京 / 上海 / 广州 (英文 QCon 中文分会)
中国信通院 / CCF / OSCAR — 国内 cloud native + open source 治理白皮书 (一手 reference)
CSDN / 掘金 / 简书 / 博客园 (cnblogs) — zh-CN 黑名单 (除非作者本人原文 + 经 surrogate_primary 鉴别)
知乎专栏 — zh-CN 黑名单 (除非作者本人 verified)
GitHub Trending + GitHub Topic (architecture / system-design / microservices) — 一手 OSS implementation reference
Hacker News (news.ycombinator.com — 一手讨论场, '一手' = 创始人 / 作者本人在评论; 一般 article 是二手)
Lobsters (lobste.rs — HN 偏 systems / engineering 替代)
Reddit r/softwarearchitecture / r/programming / r/distributed_systems / r/devops — 一手讨论但需 verify
Slack: kubernetes.slack.com / cncf.slack.com — 一手 community channel
warnings: **软件架构 = 极宽 discipline**: 单 master skill 必须明示边界 — 本 skill 覆盖『application & system architecture (web / mobile / 分布式后端)』, 不深入 (a) 硬件 / chip architecture (b) 纯 enterprise architecture (TOGAF / Zachman / FEA) — 边缘相关仅在『团队拓扑 / 组织 ↔ 架构 同构』层面提及 (c) 纯 DevOps / SRE — 相邻 vertical, 仅在『可观测性 / 可靠性』层面提及 (d) 纯 security architecture — 相邻 vertical, 仅在『authn / authz / 边界』层面提及 (e) 纯 ML / AI infrastructure — 已有 llm-agent-infra 单 prototype 覆盖 (f) 数据 platform / lakehouse 单 vertical — 仅在『polyglot persistence / OLTP vs OLAP』层面提及, 不深入 ETL 工具

**『架构师』头衔模糊**: 同一 title 在不同公司含义完全不同 — Amazon principal engineer vs Microsoft Software Architect vs 阿里 P8/P9 vs 创业公司 founding architect vs 咨询 consulting architect vs Gartner 'enterprise architect' (TOGAF) vs Solutions Architect (AWS/GCP 售前). 蒸馏的 OS 默认指 'application/system architect — 落地 design + ADR + 跨服务边界 trade-off' 的从业者. SKILL.md 必须 explicit 写: '本 skill 不涵盖 AWS 售前 Solutions Architect / Gartner 风格 Enterprise Architect / TOGAF / Zachman 框架训练'.

**Hype 周期严重**: microservices (2014-2018 hype, 2019+ 'modular monolith first' 回潮) / blockchain / Web3 / serverless / service mesh (2018-2020 hype, 2022+ 'often unnecessary') / 'AI 架构师' (2024-2026 当前 hype) — 6-12 月一个 cycle. 工具 / 工作流模块明确标 `last_updated` + decay 周期; 心智模型层不在 hyped 模式上做长期承诺.

**ThoughtWorks Tech Radar 是有 bias 的**: ThoughtWorks 是 consulting firm, 雷达倾向于推自己擅长 / 已咨询客户用的技术 (例: ThoughtWorks 推 microservices / DDD / Trunk-based dev 较重); 不是中立行业共识. 引用时标 'TW Radar 视角, 非全行业共识'. 类似: Gartner Magic Quadrant 偏大厂 / Forrester Wave 同样.

**Microservices first 反模式**: 大量公司 2014-2018 因为读 Netflix / Amazon case 直接上 microservices, 结果 distributed monolith + 运维复杂度 10x + 价值产出 1x. 反例: Stack Overflow / Shopify / GitHub / Basecamp 公开 case study 反复强调 'modular monolith first'; Sam Newman 2nd ed 整本书重申 'do not start with microservices'. SKILL.md 必须 explicit 写 '从单体起 + 边界明显时再拆' 而非 default microservices.

**K8s for everything 反模式**: 一个 5 人 CRUD app 上 Kubernetes + Istio + 全套 cloud native = 'resume-driven development' 典型. 中型公司不一定需要 K8s; Heroku / Render / Fly.io / Cloud Run 在 < 50 个服务时常更经济. 反例: DHH (Basecamp/37signals) 2024 'leaving the cloud' 系列 + 'monorails for medium-sized apps' campaign.

**'Best practice' 是 context-dependent**: 大公司 (1000+ eng) vs 创业公司 (10 eng) vs scale-up (50-200 eng) 架构 SOP 完全不同 — 大公司读 Google SRE book + Spanner paper; 创业公司读 Pieter Levels 'one-man startup' + Basecamp. SKILL.md 必须 stratify 'startup / scale-up / big-tech / enterprise' 4 个语境给不同 playbook, 不能笼统说 'always use X'.

**中国大厂 vs 中小公司差距巨大**: 阿里 Dubbo + Sentinel + Nacos + RocketMQ 全栈 vs 中小公司 SpringBoot + MySQL + Redis 单体 + 1 台 ECS — 99% 中国软件公司是后者. 中文社区文章 99% 写大厂经验 → 中小公司从业者 mis-apply 大厂方案是常见反模式. SKILL.md 必须 explicit 写 'A 公司的架构 ≠ 你公司的架构'.

**AI / LLM 对架构师角色重塑 (2024-2026)**: GitHub Copilot Chat / Cursor / Claude Code 让 boilerplate + 文档草稿 + pattern lookup 接近免费; 架构师价值更集中在 (a) 跨系统判断 (b) trade-off articulation (c) 业务 ↔ 技术 翻译 (d) team topology 设计. 但 'AI 架构师' 是当前 hype 高点 (2024-2026), 不要 over-commit; 6-12 月 decay.
**Canon 严重不平衡**: 全球 canon 90% 英文奠基 (Brooks 1975 / Parnas 1972 / Fowler / Hohpe / Evans / Kleppmann); 中文当代 (李运华 / 蔡超 / 张逸 / 沈剑) 主要 2015 后, 厚度 中文:英文 = 1:3 - 1:4. 这是行业现实, 不是偏见. 诚实边界标明.

**反面 figure 必须保留**: 'Architecture astronaut' (Joel Spolsky 2001) / 'Resume-driven development' / 'Cargo cult microservices' / 'Service-Oriented Architecture' (1.0 时代 BPEL / SOAP 失败教训) / 'XML / WS-*' overengineering — 这些是行业真实教训, 不可被洗掉. 同时: Uncle Bob 部分观点 (e.g. 'TDD = professionalism / 不写测试 = 不专业') 社区有持续争议, 引用时附 caveat.
**版权 / 长 transcripts**: 不存全本书 / 完整 podcast transcript; 仅 URL + 时间戳 + 极短引用 + 摘要. 课程内容 (极客时间 / Pluralsight) 同样.
**信噪比 (zh-CN)**: '21 天精通微服务' / '一个月成为架构师' / '面试架构师必背 100 题' 营销内容大量, 真实方法论被掩埋. 严筛 — 优先 verified_primary (作者本人 blog + 官方书 + ACM / IEEE paper + 大厂官方 engineering blog + 阿里 / 字节 / 美团 / 腾讯 公开 talk).

**zh-CN 黑名单严控**: 知乎 / 微信公众号 (含 '架构师之路' / '阿里中间件' / 各大厂技术公众号) / 百度百科 / CSDN / 掘金 (juejin.cn) / 简书 / cnblogs (博客园) — 一律 auto-classifier 判 secondary; 这些是中文软件架构一手主阵地, 但平台被黑名单, 用 surrogate_primary 处理 (note 须含 'vendor docs' / '协会' / 'syllabus' / 'JD' / 'user-provided' 等 whitelist literal keyword).

**publisher / vendor 域名 source_verifier 不认**: O'Reilly (oreilly.com), Manning (manning.com), Addison-Wesley / Pearson, Pragmatic Bookshelf (pragprog.com), No Starch — 出版社 listing 一律判 unknown host secondary; AWS / GCP / Azure architecture center (learn.microsoft.com / cloud.google.com / aws.amazon.com/architecture) 同样; vendor docs (kafka.apache.org / kubernetes.io / istio.io / postgresql.org) 同样 — subagent 从一开始就标 surrogate_primary + literal 'vendor docs' 防 Phase 1.5 137 UPGRADE 大坑复发 (architecture-design 已踩).
research_strategy_notes: Track 01 figures: 30 候选 → 筛 12-15 retained + 2 anti-figure. 流派覆盖必须含 10 个: 1) Pattern movement (Fowler / Hohpe) 2) DDD (Evans / Vernon / 张逸) 3) Clean / Hexagonal (Uncle Bob / Cockburn) 4) Microservices (Newman / Richardson) 5) Event-driven & log-centric (Young / Kreps / Helland) 6) Distributed systems thinking (Lamport / Kleppmann / Vogels) 7) Evolutionary architecture (Ford / Parsons / Brown) 8) Cloud-native (Burns / Hightower / Cockcroft) 9) Front-end architecture (Abramov / Clark) 10) 中国大厂中间件实践 (陈皓 / 李运华 / 蔡超). 中外比例 10-11 全球 + 4-5 中国. 优先 long-form (≥ 2h podcast / multi-book authorship / multi-paper paper trail).

Track 02 tools: 10 大类 (diagram / arch-as-code / API / async / mesh / orchestration / DB / observability / fitness function / 中国本土补充). 每类 3-5 + 2026 default + 何时切换. 标注 zh-CN-specific (Dubbo / SkyWalking / RocketMQ / APISIX / Sentinel) vs 国际通用 (gRPC / Envoy / Kafka / OpenTelemetry).

Track 03 workflows: 三条主线 — (a) 单系统设计 SOP: 需求理解 → 上下文 → 容器 → 组件 → 决策 ADR → POC → 渐进上线 → 监控反馈 → 演进 (即 C4 + ADR + fitness function 流), 每 phase 输出物 + 时长 + 常见反模式 (b) 公司规模分流: 创业 (10 eng) / scale-up (50-200) / 大厂 (1000+) — 每型 SOP + ADR 厚度 + 演进节奏 完全不同 (c) 横向场景: 单体拆微服务 / 全球多活 / 数据库选型 / API gateway 引入 / observability 落地 / legacy refactoring / LLM-native 应用架构. AI 辅助架构师工作流单列.

Track 04 canon: 至少含 (a) 奠基 (Parnas 1972 On the Criteria / Brooks 1975 Mythical Man-Month / Parnas+Clements 1986 Rational Design Process — How and Why to Fake It / GoF 1994 Design Patterns) (b) Enterprise pattern (Fowler 2002 PoEAA / Hohpe 2003 EIP) (c) DDD (Evans 2003 Blue Book / Vernon 2013 Red Book) (d) Stability (Nygard 2007/2018 Release It!) (e) Cloud-native (12-Factor 2011 / 2017 Beyer SRE / 2019 Burns Designing Distributed Systems) (f) Distributed (Kleppmann 2017 DDIA / Vogels 2008+ AT Distributed blog / Helland papers) (g) Microservices (Newman 2014/2021 Building Microservices / 2020 From Monolith to Microservices / Richardson 2018 Microservices Patterns) (h) Evolutionary (Ford+Parsons+Kua 2017/2023 Building Evolutionary Architectures / Ford+Richards 2020 Fundamentals of Software Architecture / 2022 Software Architecture The Hard Parts) (i) Refactoring (Fowler 1999/2018 Refactoring / Feathers 2004 Legacy Code / Beck 2024 Tidy First?) (j) Team topology (Skelton+Pais 2019) (k) 中文 (李运华 2017 亿级流量网站架构核心技术 / 张逸《解构领域驱动设计》/ 蔡超《架构师的成长之路》).

Track 05 sources: 15-20 retained, 分 (a) evergreen blog (martinfowler.com / microservices.io / enterpriseintegrationpatterns.com / All Things Distributed) (b) newsletter (ByteByteGo / Pragmatic Engineer / InfoQ Architects / Tech Radar) (c) 学术 (ACM Queue / IEEE Software / arXiv cs.DC / USENIX OSDI/SOSP / SIGMOD-VLDB) (d) podcast (SE Daily / SE Radio / GOTOpia YouTube / Thoughtworks Tech Podcast) (e) 大会 (QCon / GOTO / KubeCon / AWS re:Invent / DDD Europe) (f) reference center (AWS Well-Architected / GCP Architecture Framework / Azure Architecture Center) (g) 中文 (InfoQ 中文 / 极客时间 / ArchSummit / GIAC).

Track 06 glossary: 5 大类 — (a) 设计 vocabulary (coupling / cohesion / SRP / DRY / KISS / YAGNI / SOLID / GRASP / GoF 23 + EIP 65 / 6 architecture style) (b) 分布式 (CAP / PACELC / Paxos / Raft / Lamport clock / vector clock / linearizable / serializable / 2PC / Saga / outbox / CDC / exactly-once vs at-least-once) (c) 操作 (SLO / SLI / error budget / RED / USE / golden signal / RPO / RTO / MTBF / MTTR / circuit breaker / bulkhead / hedged request) (d) 流程 (ADR / C4 model / 4+1 view / arc42 / fitness function / Conway's Law / inverse-Conway maneuver / strangler fig / branch-by-abstraction) (e) 中国本土 (信通院 / CCF / 国密 / 等保 / 国产化 / 自主可控 / 高并发 / 春晚级流量 / 双 11). 反模式 vocabulary (architecture astronaut / cargo cult / golden hammer / God object / lava layer / spaghetti code / accidental complexity) 单列.

诚实边界: 必写 — '架构师头衔模糊 / 各家定义不同' / 'best practice 是 context-dependent: 创业 ≠ 大厂' / '中文 canon 厚度 中文:英文 = 1:3-1:4' / 'TW Tech Radar / Gartner / Forrester 有 bias' / '99% 中国软件公司 ≠ 阿里腾讯架构, 不要照搬' / 'AI / LLM 对架构师角色重塑 是 2024-2026 hype 高点, 6-12 月 decay' / '微服务 / K8s / mesh first 反模式真实存在' / 'TOGAF / Zachman 风格 EA 不在本 skill 范围' / 'observability vendor 选型有商业拉锯, 不背书单一'.

Sub-skill 候选 (Phase 3 nuwa.skill 蒸馏): Top 3 候选 — (1) Martin Fowler (软件架构 evergreen 资源 #1, 30 年 blog + 多本书 + Refactoring + PoEAA + 微服务系列 — long-form 最厚 + 跨流派思想) (2) Martin Kleppmann (DDIA 2017 已成 2017-2026 软件架构师必读 #1, 学术 + 实操 桥梁, 长 talk + 论文 + open-source Automerge) (3) 陈皓 (左耳朵耗子, 中文软件架构 #1 布道, 2024-12 去世但 CoolShell archive 1.9M+ 阅读 + MegaEase open source, 真实长文 + 反 大厂崇拜 立场鲜明 — 标 'in memoriam 2024-12'). 备选: Sam Newman (microservices 实操 + 反 microservices-first 难得) / Eric Evans (DDD 奠基 + DDD Europe 主声).

URL 黑名单严控: zh-CN 知乎 / mp.weixin.qq.com / 百度百科 / CSDN / cnblogs / jianshu / juejin.cn 一律 declare = surrogate_primary 当 note literal 含 whitelist keyword (vendor docs / 协会 / syllabus / JD / user-provided); declare = blacklisted 整行剔除; 不可 verified_primary. ByteByteGo / Pragmatic Engineer 等 newsletter 创作者 裸域博客 (alexxu.dev / pragmaticengineer.com) auto 判 secondary, declare surrogate_primary + 'vendor docs / author personal site' literal. publisher 域名 (oreilly.com / manning.com / pragprog.com) auto secondary, declare surrogate_primary + 'vendor docs' literal. vendor docs (kafka.apache.org / kubernetes.io / istio.io / postgresql.org / aws.amazon.com/architecture / learn.microsoft.com/azure/architecture / cloud.google.com/architecture) 同样. 大厂 engineering blog (engineering.linkedin.com / netflixtechblog.com / shopify.engineering / stripe.com/blog / github.blog) declare surrogate_primary + 'vendor docs / engineering blog' literal. GitHub / GitLab repo README + papers PDF 是 verified_primary (一手). HN / Lobsters 评论是 secondary (除非创始人本人 verified). Wikipedia 是 reference 不上 primary. Pinterest / Behance 不入. LinkedIn 个人帖 谨慎 (公司员工立场 ≠ 个人深度).

checked_dirs: skill/prototypes/llm-agent-infra-master (LLM agent 基础设施 — 软件架构的一个 vertical, 与本 skill 关系: subset; 本 skill 在 §AI/LLM 模块层提及 LLM-native app architecture 但不深入 RAG / agent loop / context window 细节)
skill/prototypes/architecture-design-master (建筑设计 — 完全不同 discipline, 名字相近但 0 重叠)
skill/prototypes/ios-app-launch-master (iOS app 上架 — 应用层 ASO + 商店运营, 与系统架构 0 重叠)
skill/prototypes/monetize-agents-master (agent 商业化 — 偏 product / GTM 不偏 architecture, 0 重叠)
其他 18 个 prototype (跨境电商 / 律师 / 医疗 / 短视频 / 公众号 / 心理咨询 / VC 等) 与软件架构 0 重叠
deduplication_check.overlap_assessment: 与现有 22 个 prototype 实质重叠 < 5% — 仅 llm-agent-infra 是 software-architecture 的一个 vertical (LLM-native app architecture), 本 skill 覆盖通用 application/system architecture, 二者 hierarchy 而非冲突. 本 skill 独立 vertical 完全成立, 是 engineering discipline 大类的核心 prototype.

estimated_research_effort.track_01_figures: heavy (30 候选 → 12-15 retained + 10 流派覆盖 + 中外并重 4-5 中国 figure, 每位 long-form material 充足)
estimated_research_effort.track_02_tools: heavy (10 大类 + 中国本土补充, AI 辅助架构 + 服务网格 + observability + fitness function 子类需独立调研)
estimated_research_effort.track_03_workflows: heavy (单系统 SOP + 公司规模分流 4 种 + 横向场景 7 种, 三轴 SOP, AI 辅助单列)
estimated_research_effort.track_04_canon: very heavy (50+ 年 canon 跨度: Parnas 1972 → Kleppmann 2017 → Software Architecture The Hard Parts 2022, 11 大类 含中文 7 本)
estimated_research_effort.track_05_sources: heavy (7 大类 sources, 中外并重, evergreen + newsletter + 学术 + podcast + 大会 + reference center + 中文)
estimated_research_effort.track_06_glossary: heavy (5 大类术语 + 反模式 vocabulary 单列 + 中文本土合规)
estimated_research_effort.estimated_total_hours: 40-55h 高质量调研 + 14-20h synthesis (单人估算, 可并行)
